sections.description: Full-stack SEO management plugin. Handles title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, cache purge, and self-updates. RankMath not required.
sections.changelog:
2.0.6

Fix llms.txt 301 trailing-slash redirect loop: switch from rewrite rule to wp hook + REQUEST_URI (same pattern as sitemap). Remove unused add_rewrite_rule from init.

2.0.5

Fix WSOD on Cloudways/LiteSpeed: removed register_activation_hook flush.
